impacts.statement: Flood of Record occurred on August 13, 2016.  Widespread flooding will occur over low-lying areas. LA Hwy 37, LA Hwy 64, and LA Hwy 1019 will be impacted, along with other roads.
Agricultural areas will begin to flood with pastures, cropland, and woodlands near LA Hwy 64 inundated. Portions of Highway 1036 and Lockhart Road will be under water.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 24 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.
